items.claim: Jared Cannonier is on a downward career trajectory.
items.quote: Caner's, you know, way on his way down.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier has absorbed a significant amount of damage in his last five fights.
items.quote: These last five fights, he has taken a ton of damage, and that just can't be ignored.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is one of the most durable fighters in the UFC.
items.quote: This guy, I truly believe, is one of the most durable guys in the UFC.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has never been hurt or knocked out in his professional career.
items.quote: I've never seen Christian Leroy Duncan hurt. He has 16 MMA fights and he has like a million amateur fights. I've never seen him hurt. He's never been knocked out.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has a tendency to fight at a low intensity as if he is sparring.
items.quote: The one knock on Christian Leroy Duncan has always been it looks like he's sparring in there at times.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman is far past his prime.
items.quote: I think Hamzat is in his prime and Usman is far far past it.
